---
title: "CV"
---

## Education

**University of Toronto**  
Master of Financial Insurance 2025-2026

**University of Toronto**  
Honours Bachelor of Science  
Mathematical Applications in Economics and Finance Specialist, Minor in Statistics

## Interests

Quantitative finance, risk modelling, machine learning, statistical theories, and asset-liability management.

## Links

- Resume PDF: Coming soon
- GitHub: https://github.com/SOMNIVM
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/dinghui-chen
